Outdoors

Adventure

Every trail, river, and bonfire is planned for your group.

Built for groups who want to actually do things.

Mitraay sits in the Sahyadri foothills, on the river, 25km from Raigad Fort, and within day-trip distance of some of Maharashtra's best outdoor destinations. Every group gets a custom activity plan.

Right here

On-property experiences

On-property

Nature Walk

A guided walk through the working farm and Sahyadri foothills. Identify plants, birds, insects, and learn about the river ecosystem, no distance required.

On-property

River Swimming

Swim and splash in the river right at the property. Cool, clear water and rocky banks, the highlight of any group stay in monsoon and post-monsoon season.

Return to hot vegetarian meals made from farm-grown produce. Hot water in every room, and a bonfire to end the evening.

Day trips from the resort

Outside experiences

Heritage · 25km

Raigad Fort & Ropeway

Walk the ramparts of Chhatrapati Shivaji's capital and ride the ropeway to the summit. 25km from Mitraay, guide and tour manager arranged.

Water · 15km

Kolad River Rafting

Grade II–III rapids on the Kundalika river. Maharashtra's premier white water experience, 15km from Mitraay.

Trek · Nearby

Mangad Trek

A lesser-known Sahyadri gem. Dense forest trails and dramatic ridgelines within striking distance.

Nature · 2 hr trek

Devkund Waterfall

A pristine jungle waterfall accessible only on foot. One of the cleanest natural pools in the Sahyadri.

Nature · 11km

Kumbhe Waterfall

178 feet of freefall into lush Raigad valley. Best visited in monsoon, 11km from Mitraay.

Adventure in pictures

Let's make it happen

Ready to plan your group trip?

Tell us your group size, dates, and what kind of adventure you have in mind. We'll put together a custom plan.

Chat on WhatsApp
Tailored for your group

Every group gets a custom activity plan.

Based on your group's fitness level, ages, and interests. We plan every day to match what your group actually wants to do.

Plan Your Adventure
Mitraay

A purposeful farm retreat near Raigad Fort, Raigad, Maharashtra. Built for groups who want more than a getaway.

A project by Vedbhoomi Eco Village
